_comment: Copy this file to slop.config.json and restart the server to switch on Google Sign-In.
_setup: 2. Create Credentials -> OAuth client ID -> Web application
3. Add your site origin to 'Authorized JavaScript origins' (e.g. http://localhost:3000 and your live domain)
4. Copy the Client ID (ends with .apps.googleusercontent.com) into googleClientId below
5. Rename this file to slop.config.json and run: node server.js
The server verifies every Google credential against Google's tokeninfo endpoint, so the secret never matters client-side.
